text: Hands down the best, as you can tell from all the 5 star reviews here.
author: Bryan Menell

text: Thank you for being so good to me during such a painful process! I had to get my microbladed brows done three times. It’s such a delicate place to get work done. Chris did all my treatments. He is a super nice guy, very easy to talk to, and he made it much more tolerable. The place always looks spotless too. I recommend going here for whatever ink you need to be removed.
author: Jodi Sanford

text:
My tattoos were a bad decision. Coming to Clean Slate Ink was a great one.
Super friendly and extremely professional they took care to listen and answer my questions without judgment. Impeccably clean, professional, and attentive!
If you have a tattoo you regret, they are the best choice in Central Texas to remove it.
author: James Burgess

text: Christopher Harris, the owner, put me at ease and answered all my questions. He is friendly and goes out of the way to make sure you understand the procedure and what to expect. Great facility, good guy, big heart.
author: Julie Coombes

text: I had a great experience for my first consultation and first treatment. He was very knowledgeable. Explained the process and what expectations I should have. The facility is very clean and quiet. Clean bathrooms. I'll update this later with how the removal is going, but he told me because my tattoo is older it may take only 5 to 7 treatments, which is less than I had expected.
author: Christie

text: Friendly service and I'm seeing great results! I'm thankful to have a removal clinic so close to home with many convenient appointment times to choose from.
author: Sara Sutton

text: Chris is amazing!! Answers all your questions about the process and makes you feel comfortable with everything before, during, and afterwards!! 10/10 recommend!
author: Sofia Reyes

text: "My microblading removal experience was fantastic here. It was affordable and incredibly effective. Surely going for second session .Highly recommend
author: Ekta Mahat
